title: Public Engagement & Ops Executive (Data/Central, Up 3,000,)
description:
The Opportunity:

  • Our Client is a well‑established organisation in the public-facing/Govt sector, working closely with multiple partners and stakeholders to deliver programmes, campaigns and initiatives that engage the community
  • Location: Central/Orchard
  • Salary: Up to $3,000 (depending on experience)
  • 1 year contract (Renewable) - Can convert with good performance
  • Working hours: 8.30am - 6pm

Job Responsibilities:

  • 1. Public Correspondence

    • Draft clear, accurate, and timely responses to enquiries and feedback from members of the public
    • Ensure all replies align with established policies, guidelines, and service standards

    2. Stakeholder Management

    • Manage and respond to queries from stakeholders, including schools
    • Provide operational support relating to school canteen operations and school bus services

    3. Site Visits & Issue Resolution

    • Conduct on-site assessments of school canteen operations and school bus services
    • Identify operational issues and collaborate with relevant parties to troubleshoot and resolve problems
    • Document findings, insights, and recommendations from site visits

    4. Surveys & Feedback Collection

    • Assist in planning, administering, and conducting surveys
    • Compile survey responses and ensure accurate documentation of findings

    5. Data Management & Reporting

    • Perform precise data entry and maintain databases and records
    • Analyse data and prepare summaries, reports, and presentation materials for management review

    6. Records Management

    • Maintain organised and up-to-date filing systems in line with record‑keeping requirements
    • Ensure information is properly documented, updated, and easily retrievable

Job Requirements:

  • Any Diploma or equivalent and above
  • Strong written communication skills
  • A meticulous and organised approach to work
  • Ability to coordinate with multiple stakeholders
  • Comfortable working on-site and interacting with partners on operational matter
  • Proficiency in data handling and basic data analysis

Next Step:

  • Prepare your updated resume and Simply click on 'Apply here' to drop your resume or send your resume to eugene.see@adecco.com

Eugene See

Direct Line: 8889 1296

EA License No: 91C2918

Personnel Registration Number: R21102460

postedCompany.description:
The Adecco Group is the world's leading provider of HR solutions. With over 35,000 FTE employees and over 5,200 branches, in over 60 countries and territories around the world, we offer a wide variety of services, connecting more than 650,000 associates with over 100,000 clients every day.

The services we offer fall into the broad categories of temporary staffing, permanent placement, career transition and talent development, as well as outsourcing and consulting. The Adecco Group is based in Zurich-Glattbrugg, Switzerland and we are a Fortune Global 500 company listed on the SIX Swiss Exchange.
postedCompany.name: ADECCO PERSONNEL PTE LTD
